info.name: FiFi Alert API
info.description: Complete API collection for the FiFi Alert geolocation-based missing pet notification system. Includes authentication, alert management, device registration, sightings, and admin operations.

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Authenticate a user with email and password. Returns access token, refresh token, and user details.
Register a new user account.
Get the currently authenticated user's details including roles and gates.
Sign out the current user and invalidate their session.
Initiate password reset process by sending a reset link to the user's email.
Reset password using a valid token received via email.
Update password for the currently authenticated user.
Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token.

item.description: User authentication endpoints including login, signup, password management, and token refresh.

request.description: Check system health including database, Redis, and disk space. Returns 200 if healthy, 503 if any issues.

item.name: Alerts

body.raw:
{
  "pet_name": "Buddy",
  "pet_type": "DOG",
  "breed": "Golden Retriever",
  "color": "Golden",
  "size": "LARGE",
  "distinctive_features": "White patch on chest, wearing blue collar",
  "last_seen_location": {
    "latitude": 40.7128,
    "longitude": -74.0060,
    "address": "Central Park, New York, NY"
  },
  "last_seen_time": "2026-02-06T10:30:00Z",
  "contact_phone": "+1234567890",
  "contact_email": "owner@example.com",
  "reward_amount": 500,
  "additional_notes": "Very friendly, responds to 'Buddy'"
}

request.description: Create a new missing pet alert. Rate limited to 5 alerts per hour.
Get details of a specific alert by ID.
Search for alerts by location (lat/lon + radius) with optional filters for status and pet type.
Update an existing alert. Only the alert creator can update.
Mark an alert as resolved. Only the alert creator can resolve.
Extend alert expiration by 7 days. Maximum 3 renewals allowed.
Upload photos for an alert. Max 5 files, 10MB each. Supported formats: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp.

item.description: Missing pet alert management including creation, updates, resolution, and photo uploads.

item.name: Pets

request.description: Register a new pet. A unique 9-character tag ID will be automatically generated.
Get all pets for the authenticated user.
Get details of a specific pet by ID. User must own the pet.
Public endpoint to look up a pet by its unique tag ID. No authentication required. Rate limited to 20 requests per minute.
Update pet details. User must own the pet.
Mark a pet as missing. User must own the pet.
Mark a pet as found. Automatically resolves any active alerts for this pet. User must own the pet.
Delete a pet. User must own the pet. Returns 204 No Content on success.
Create an alert for a registered pet by including petId. The pet will be automatically marked as missing.

item.description: Pet management including registration, updates, and missing/found status tracking.

item.name: Devices

request.description: Register a new device or update existing device (idempotent operation).
Get all devices for the current user, ordered by last app open.
Update GPS coordinates and/or postal codes for a device.
Update the push notification token when refreshed by the OS.
Create a saved zone for high-priority notifications. Max 5 zones per device.
Get all saved zones for a device, ordered by priority.
Update name, radius, priority, or active status of a saved zone.
Delete a saved zone. This action cannot be undone.

item.description: Device registration, location updates, and saved zone management.

request.description: Report a sighting of a missing pet. The alert must be in ACTIVE status.
Get all sightings for a specific alert. Non-creators cannot see dismissed sightings.
Dismiss a sighting. Only the alert creator can dismiss sightings.
Upload a photo for a sighting. Max 10MB.

item.name: Users

request.description: Create a new user. Admin only.
Get paginated list of users with optional filtering.
Get a specific user by ID with optional relationship includes.
Get a user by their email address.
Update user details. Admin or Manager only.
Delete a user. Admin only.
Assign a gate (feature flag) to a user. Admin only.
Remove a gate from a user. Admin only.
Get all gates assigned to a user. Admin only.

item.description: User management endpoints (admin access required for most operations).

item.name: Gates (Feature Flags)

request.description: Create a new feature gate. Admin only.
Get all feature gates. Admin only.
Get a specific gate by ID. Admin only.
Update a gate. Admin only.
Delete a gate. Admin only.
Get all users assigned to a specific gate. Admin only.

item.description: Feature flag (gate) management for controlling access to features.

item.name: Admin

request.description: Ban a user account. Omit expiresInMinutes for permanent ban. Admin only.
Remove ban from a user account. Admin only.
List all active user sessions with optional user filter. Admin only.
Revoke a specific session. Admin only.

item.description: Administrative operations including user bans and session management.
